breakdown: Naming: Test function names are highly descriptive (e.g., test_runtime_bootstrap_skips_numpy_downgrade_when_repair_not_needed). Variables like commands, missing_modules are reasonably clear but somewhat generic. Error Handling: Tests verify error responses (status_code, error messages), simulate CalledProcessError, and assert on failure conditions. Type Safety: Type hints present (Path, list, etc.) but some dynamic constructs like type('Proc') and lambdas without hints reduce score. Architecture: Well-organized tests with appropriate mocking via monkeypatch. New test file follows existing patterns. Test Coverage: Excellent coverage of edge cases (numpy downgrade, cache invalidation, fallback packages, spaces in paths). Documentation: No docstrings on test functions. No explanatory comments for WHY scenarios exist. Only one inline noqa comment.
key_changes: Added test_process_action_stream_infers_failure_without_explicit_success to verify error response handling
Added test_runtime_bootstrap_skips_numpy_downgrade_when_repair_not_needed to test numpy version logic
Added test_runtime_bootstrap_invalidates_caches_and_uses_timeouts to verify cache invalidation and timeouts
Added test_runtime_bootstrap_tries_fallback_package_candidates to test fallback package logic
Created new test file tests/scripts/test_loc_script.py for LOC script testing
Added test_loc_script_handles_spaces_and_boundary_aware_test_detection for path handling with spaces
